what_it_does: Automatically monitors Gmail for Upwork job alerts, uses GPT-4 to evaluate job fit in two stages, and logs only high-confidence opportunities to Google Sheets.
pain_it_solves: Eliminates the need to manually sift through daily job alert blasts and waste time reviewing low-fit opportunities.
outcome: Teams only respond to high-confidence job matches, saving hours each week while improving proposal quality.
opener_hook_draft: Drowning in daily job alerts but only landing low-fit work that wastes your proposal time?
bespoke_opener_full: Drowning in daily job alerts but only landing low-fit work that wastes your proposal time? This is how our Project07 Automation System lets you respond only to high-confidence matches while saving hours each week. In the next 90 seconds, I'll show you exactly how it works.
